_info: Zentrale Marken-Konfiguration für den Instagram-Bot. Jedes Topic in topics.json kann optional ein Feld "brand" haben. Fehlt es, wird default_brand genutzt.

familie.name: FamilienApp
familie.character: stylized 3D animated Pixar family: mother around 32 with chestnut brown hair in a soft bun, warm hazel eyes, mustard yellow knit cardigan; father around 34 with short dark brown hair, neat short beard, soft sky blue shirt; 8-year-old daughter with chestnut pigtails tied with pink ribbons, pink polka dot dress; chubby cheerful baby with peach onesie; a fluffy black Newfoundland dog with a distinctive white chest patch

app_reel.outro_sub_html:
Alles für deine Familie.
In einer App.
app_reel.caption_cta: 📲 Lade die FamilienApp kostenlos — Link im Profil!

hund.name: Hundeleben
hund.character: stylized 3D animated Pixar style scene featuring Balu, a single big fluffy all-black Newfoundland dog wearing a clearly visible bright red collar, big soulful warm brown eyes with bright catchlights, a gentle expressive face with a soft friendly smile and slightly floppy ears; sometimes accompanied by a friendly young German owner in their early 30s only when the scene clearly requires a human; Balu the dog is always the central character
